name: Montclair Indoor Golf Club
about: Montclair Indoor Golf Club is a modern facility offering year-round golf simulation with a focus on technology and player development. The venue utilizes premium TrackMan launch monitors in its three bays, providing detailed data and a realistic playing experience for golfers of all skill levels. Services include individual and group instruction, performance coaching, club fittings, and an easy-to-use app for booking and tracking progress.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology in all bays
Convenient downtown Millburn location with ample parking
Clean, modern facilities and excellent staff

food_and_drink.notes: Located in Downtown Millburn with access to food and drinks before or after rounds.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the facility provides well-maintained equipment and club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The club is located in Downtown Millburn with access to food and drinks before or after your round, though BYOB policy within the facility is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the number of players and simulator usage, but sessions can be booked online for specific time slots.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is welcoming to families and all skill levels, with instructors experienced in coaching juniors and beginners.
